productDisplayName: Warner Bros Kids Girls TJ Playlogs Pink Sandals
description: It's comfort and fun rolled into one in these TJ Playlogs from Warner Brothers. These clogs are crafted from soft PU in a single casing, offering unparalleled comfort to your little one's feet. Upper Soft PU forefoot strap with cut outs to accommodate jibbitz Appliqued cartoon characters on the forefoot strap Movable and flexible backfoot strap made of PU PU footbed ergonomically textured for all-day comfort Outsole PU outsole with ergonomic shaped lugs, that has a pivot point on the big toe mound and a grippy heel unit Care Wipe with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
